name: Zhangzhou Pientzehuang Pharmaceutical., Ltd
summary: Zhangzhou Pientzehuang Pharmaceutical., Ltd produces and sells Chinese medicines. The company's product categories include medicines and health products, healthy foods, cosmetics, daily chemicals, and medical apparatus and instruments. The company is based in Zhangzhou, China. Zhangzhou Pientzehuang Pharmaceutical., Ltd is a subsidiary of Zhangzhou Jiulongjiang Construction Co., Ltd.
